name: Paladin: Channel Divinity + Divine Smite burst vs undead
description: Tests the complete Paladin bonus action economy: (1) Channel Divinity (Divine Sense) consumes the bonus action + 1 CD use, blocking smite that round; (2) Divine Smite on-hit opt-in via 'with divine smite' in damage text consumes the lowest available spell slot (L1 first, L2 only when L1 exhausted); (3) Lay on Hands as bonus action self-heal; (4) bonus action contention — CD, Smite, and LoH all compete for one bonus action per turn. Level 5 Devotion Paladin vs undead. CD at L5 = 1 use/rest. Character starts at 75/100 HP to enable LoH self-heal test in R4.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action

features.name: Divine Smite
features.description: After a melee hit, expend a spell slot + bonus action for 2d8+ radiant damage (L1 slot = 2d8, L2 = 3d8)

features.name: Lay on Hands
features.description: Bonus action: restore HP from a 25-point healing pool (5 x level)

features.name: Channel Divinity
features.description: 1/rest at L5: use Divine Sense as a bonus action to detect celestials, fiends, and undead within 60 feet

monsters.comment: Shadow Wight — undead tank with 100 HP to survive 3+ rounds of smiting for spell slot economy tests.
monsters.name: Shadow Wight

monsters.comment: Skeleton Warrior A — undead minion. Queued to endTurn throughout for deterministic paladin HP tracking.
monsters.name: Skeleton Warrior A

monsters.comment: Skeleton Warrior B — undead minion. Queued to endTurn throughout.
monsters.name: Skeleton Warrior B

actions.comment: === ROUND 1: Initiative + Channel Divinity (Divine Sense) + Attack without Smite (BA contention) ===

input.text: I advance on the undead, calling upon my divine power

actions.comment: Paladin rolls 18 on initiative — goes first in the order.
R1 bonus action: Divine Sense (Channel Divinity). Consumes 1 CD use + bonus action. Detects undead within 60 ft.
Verify: channelDivinity:paladin pool depleted from 1 to 0. L5 paladin gets exactly 1 CD use per rest.
R1 main action: Attack Shadow Wight. Bonus action spent on Divine Sense → smite NOT eligible (BA already consumed).
Attack roll: 14 + 7 = 21 vs AC 13 → hit. Smite ineligible this turn (BA consumed by Divine Sense). No eligibleEnhancements asserted.
Damage roll: 6 + 4 = 10 slashing. No 'with divine smite' — BA is already spent. Extra Attack auto-chains via scenario runner (natural-1 miss).
Verify: L1 spell slots UNCHANGED at 4/4. No smite used this round (BA was blocked by Divine Sense).
Queue all 3 monsters to endTurn in R1. Keeps paladin HP stable at 75 for the LoH self-heal test in R4.
=== ROUND 2: Attack + Divine Smite with L1 slot (opt-in via damage text) ===
Attack roll: 14 + 7 = 21 vs AC 13 → hit. Fresh bonus action available — server shows Divine Smite as eligible enhancement.
Damage + Smite: '5 with divine smite' → 5+4=9 slashing base + server rolls 2d8 radiant (L1 slot). Costs L1 slot + bonus action. EA auto-chains.
Verify: L1 spell slots decremented from 4 → 3. Divine Smite always picks the lowest available slot (L1 over L2).
Verify: L2 spell slots UNCHANGED at 2/2. Smite used L1 (lowest available) — L2 is untouched.
Queue all 3 monsters to endTurn in R2. Preserving paladin HP for LoH test.
=== ROUND 3: Second Divine Smite (L1 slot again — lowest slot rule) ===
Attack roll: 15 + 7 = 22 vs AC 13 → hit. Smite still eligible (fresh BA, 3 L1 slots remain).
Damage + Smite: 7+4=11 slashing base + server 2d8 radiant. Second L1 slot consumed: 3 → 2. L2 still untouched.
Verify: L1 spell slots at 2/4 after two smites (R2 and R3). Lowest-slot rule: both used L1.
Verify: L2 slots STILL at 2/2. Smite never used L2 because L1 was always available (lowest slot preference).
Queue all 3 monsters to endTurn in R3. Preserving paladin HP at 75 for LoH test.
=== ROUND 4: Lay on Hands (bonus action) + Attack without Smite (BA contention test) ===
actions.comment2: Paladin HP is 75 (monsters queued endTurn kept HP stable). LoH pool = 25. Healing: min(25 missing, 25 pool) = 25 → HP to 100.

actions.comment: Verify: LoH pool fully spent (25 → 0). Healed all 25 missing HP (75+25=100).
Verify: Paladin HP restored to full (75 + 25 LoH = 100). Missing HP = 0 so pool was fully consumed.
R4 main action: Attack Shadow Wight. Bonus action spent on LoH → smite NOT eligible (same BA contention as R1 with CD).
Attack roll: 14 + 7 = 21 vs AC 13 → hit. BA already consumed by LoH — no smite eligible.
Damage roll: 6 + 4 = 10 slashing. No smite declared (BA spent on LoH). EA auto-chains.
=== FINAL STATE ASSERTIONS ===
L1 still 2/4: no smite in R4 (BA was spent on LoH). Smites only used in R2 and R3.
L2 untouched at 2/2: Divine Smite always consumes the lowest available slot. L1 was available in both smite rounds, so L2 was never used.
CD exhausted: 0/1 (used in R1 for Divine Sense). Recharges on short or long rest.
